page_metadata.bioconda__summary: SMALT aligns DNA sequencing reads with a reference genome.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Aligns dna sequencing reads with a reference genome. reads from a wide range of sequencing platforms can be processed except for solid reads.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Aligns DNA sequencing reads with a reference genome. Reads from a wide range of sequencing platforms can be processed except for SOLiD reads.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Aligns DNA sequencing reads with a reference genome. Reads from a wide range of sequencing platforms can be processed except for SOLiD reads.
